title: Jamaican Dark Chocolate Stew
description: A rich and flavorful stew made with dark chocolate, jamaican spices, and tender beef. Perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Season the beef with salt and black pepper.
Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the allspice, brown sugar, and roasted coffee. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the dates and water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
Add the chocolate and stir until melted.
Mix in the flour to thicken the stew.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Note: If desired, serve with crusty bread or over mashed potatoes.
